channel.title: New local problems on FixMyStreet
channel.description: The latest local problems reported by users

item.title: Car seems to be abandoned, 1st April
item.description:
This car has been parked here for nearly10 years, it has not moved once. No one seems to know who it belongs to, it has been sorned but I think it is ultimately been abandoned. Vines were growing under and over it, the maintenance gardeners had to uncover it and work around it when pruning tree & the vines nearby.
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Canada Road, Slade Green, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Sofa left at side of road, 1st April
item.description:
Sofa and other items fly tipped at side of road
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 200, Kennington Lane, Kennington, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Spa road parking sign is vandelised, 1st April
item.description:
A permit holders timeplate is sprayed on spa road opposite to 40 zone g
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 150, Spa Road, Bermondsey, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Flat 28 wilton house, dumped rubbish including babies nappies, 1st April
item.description:
This flat has left unhygeinic waste for 3 days,babies nappies, last year caused a maggot infestation due to dumped rubbish.please can this be cleared away as tenant is too lazy to do it herself. Flat 28 wilton house SE228AE dog kennel hill estate

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Albrighton Road, East Dulwich, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.description:
2 large fly tip items as seen in photo

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Newent Close, Old Kent Road, Greater London

item.title: Litter from bin bag left out - Queens Drive, 1st April
item.description:
Litter from bin bag left out overnight - Queens Drive near Somerfield Road

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Queens Drive, Hackney, London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Melted public bin, 1st April
item.description:
Someone decided to melt the existing bin a couple of weeks ago. No replacement has been provided so rubbish is being dumped under the bench and now looks like people are just placing stuff on top of it.

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Turkey Street, Enfield
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Dog poop bins full and overflowing, 1st April
item.description:
The dog poop litter bins on both ends of the park on Collins Way and Sayers Way Erith DA8 have been full and now overflowing for at least 3 weeks. Please empty these urgently, the flies/rodents are attracted to the bins, lids are open unable to close fully because of overspill.
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Collins Way, Slade Green, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Junk dumped, 1st April
item.description:
This flytipping occurred a couple of days ago on County Grove close to the junction with Baldwin Crescent

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): County Grove, Camberwell, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: 10 meter, 1st April
item.description:
More than 6 month this pothole very long and trafick using other side of the road to avoid to pass on it

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 7-21, Goswell Road, City of London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Mattress blocking pavement, 1st April
item.description:
A mattress has been dumped and is blocking the pavement next to bus stop

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Griffin Road, Plumstead
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Estate agent pole and board cable-tied to Council street name plate in Foxes Dale at jct with Shortlands Rd, Shortlands., 1st April
item.description:
Estate agent pole and board cable-tied to Council street name plate in Foxes Dale at jct with Shortlands Rd, Shortlands. This constitutes the criminal offence act of flyposting JDM estate agent, I think. Seen from a moving vehicle on 30/3/26
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Foxes Dale, Shortlands, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.description:

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Shortlands Road, Shortlands, Greater London

item.title: Multiple stickers on lamp column and two other columns or sign poles within 10m, lamp column in Station Rd Penge between the Station building and the footbridge., 1st April
item.description:
Multiple stickers on lamp column and two other columns or sign poles within 10m, lamp column in Station Rd Penge between the Station building and the footbridge. NB at least 3 columns or poles have stickers on within 10 metres.

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Station Road, Penge, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Fly tipping outside churchward house, 1st April
item.description:
I notice some people in a blue minivan fly tipping outside churchward house at around 1.20am.
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Lorrimore Road, Walworth, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: 25/3/26 - Yet again (about the 5th occurrence) the Give Way sign in Valley Rd at the jct with Shortlands Rd is rotated 90° away from oncoming traffic., 1st April
item.description:
25/3/26 - Yet again (about the 5th occurrence) the Give Way sign in Valley Rd at the jct with Shortlands Rd is rotated 90° away from oncoming traffic. I have previously requested a permanent fix such as putting a pair of nuts and bolts through the sign and post. Yet nothing is done. The sign rotates. I report it. You do a temporary repair by rotating it back. It rotates again. Please do a PERMANENT repair!

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Valley Road, Shortlands, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: New electric vehicle spaces, 1st April
item.description:
Parking has become a lot worse on my road since the introduction of electric charging points. There are now more instances of dangerous illegal parking. There is still public parking available which reduces availability for residents.
Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Woodberry Grove, Hackney, London
Report on FixMyStreet
